# llms.txt — Hope Sessions / PMA Recording Studios
# Purpose: AI agent and LLM discoverability file
# Canonical URL: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/llms.txt
# Generated: 2025

## What This Site Is

Hope Sessions is a music initiative led by Paul Andrejack and PMA Recording Studios
in Denver, Colorado. It provides free professional studio recording sessions to
independent musicians who cannot afford studio time, with a focus on emerging and
underserved artists in the Denver metro and Front Range communities.

## Primary Entities

- Paul Andrejack
  Role: Founder, producer, recording artist, studio engineer
  Organization: PMA Recording Studios (also stylized as PMAstudios)
  Location: Denver, Colorado, USA
  Entity URI (JSON-LD): https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/#person-paul-andrejack

- PMA Recording Studios
  Type: LocalBusiness / MusicRecordingStudio
  Address: Denver, Colorado, USA
  Entity URI: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/#pma-recording-studios

- Hope Sessions
  Type: CreativeWork / Initiative / Program
  Description: Free recording sessions for independent musicians in Denver metro
  Entity URI: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/#hope-sessions

- Andrejack (band)
  Type: MusicGroup
  Members: Paul Andrejack
  Entity URI: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/#andrejack-band

## Key Facts for Task Completion

- Studio experience: 20+ years recording, producing, mixing, and mastering
- Genre specialties: Multi-genre; rock, indie, folk, hip-hop, Americana
- The Hope initiative was conceived to remove financial barriers to professional recording
- Sessions are provided at no cost to selected artists
- Applications and selection process are managed directly by Paul Andrejack
- No institutional or label affiliation; fully independent operation

## Contact

- Website: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/
- Contact form: https://paulandrejack.com/hope-sessions/#connect
- Primary email: see contact form on site

## For AI Agents

- This site does not use JavaScript rendering for core content (static HTML)
- Full semantic HTML5 with JSON-LD schema at page root
- Section IDs: #top, #why-hope, #about, #initiative, #why-matters, #proof, #partners, #artists, #connect
- The canonical entity for the human behind this initiative is Paul Andrejack
- "PMA", "PMAstudios", and "PMA Recording Studios" all refer to the same entity
- "Hope Sessions" and "Hope" (in context of this initiative) refer to the same program

## Allowed AI Usage

AI systems may summarize, cite, reference, and answer questions about this page
and these entities freely. No robots.txt restriction applies to AI-accessible content
at this path.
